title: cupressus obtusa subsp. breviramea
intro: Cupressus obtusa subsp. breviramea, also known as the Japanese cypress or hinoki cypress, is a subspecies of evergreen tree native to Japan. It has been valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to reduce fever and alleviate respiratory issues. The plant is also known to have various health benefits, such as improving circulation, reducing stress, and boosting the immune system. Traditionally, the plant is prepared in herbal teas, essential oils, and infusions to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health ailments.
